1.description: get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get kvikkleire kartleggingsomrade polygons to be reduced by municipality extent

3.description: reduce kvikkleire polygons to Lillestrøm extent (municipality -> kvikkleire)

4.description: get 1 km grid cells to be reduced by municipality extent

5.description: reduce 1 km grid to Lillestrøm extent (municipality -> grid)

6.description: get parcels (teig) in Lillestrøm using kommunenummer filter

7.description: select parcels that intersect reduced kvikkleire polygons (parcels in quick-clay)

8.description: assign parcels-in-quickclay to reduced 1 km grid cells (grid <- parcels)

9.description: count distinct parcels per grid cell

3.sql: SELECT objid, teigid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

4.sql: SELECT id, objid, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km;

1.description: get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: get parcels (teig) limited to Lillestrøm by kommunenummer

4.description: get 1km grid cells (national) as candidate cells

5.description: reduce the national 1km grid to cells intersecting the Lillestrøm municipality geometry

6.description: find parcels (teig) whose representasjonspunkt intersects quick-clay kartleggingsomrade (parcels in quick-clay areas)

7.description: assign parcels-in-quick-clay to the reduced 1km grid cells (which parcel belongs to which cell)

8.description: count distinct parcels per grid cell

9.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending and tie-break by grid id ascending

10.description: return the top 5 grid cells with highest parcel counts
